sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Demophilus</hi> Gnomologus [Demoph.] <title_ TEIform="title">Sent. = Sententiae,</title_> ed. J. C. Orelli, <title_ TEIform="title">Opuscula Graecorum Veterum Sententiosa</title_> i p. 37, Leipzig 1819; cf. H. Schenkl, <title_ TEIform="title">Wien. Stud.</title_> viii (1886), p. 262. <title_ TEIform="title">Sim. = Similitudines,</title_> ed. F. W. A. Mullach, <title_ TEIform="title">FPG</title_> i p. 485; cf. A. Elter, <title_ TEIform="title">Gnomica Homoeomata</title_> v, Bonn 1900.</item>
